intro:
A narrative choice adventure about the end of the world.
Live out your last day on earth however you please. Your choices will quickly veer into the unpredictable.
description:
Why is the world ending? In The End Comes Tomorrow, finding that answer isn’t so simple. With dozens of branching pathways to take, your last day could end without even getting out of bed. The choice to stay home, take a walk, see neighbors, or watch TV all tell their own mini-narrative that slowly builds the larger picture.

Each story moment can be completed in a matter of minutes, with the full game taking around half an hour to see every possible outcome, making it a perfect bedtime story or fun way to pass an afternoon for fans of classic choose your own adventure books.

With 17 major story moments that range from funny to touching and introspective, you won’t want to stop until you’ve seen them all.

Classic interactive fiction evolves with modern comforts, auto-save, beautifully rendered scenes, and full voice narration that brings your story to life.
